NCT01895361.label: Outcome
NCT01895361.source: The New England journal of medicine
NCT01895361.text: METHODS: In this double-blind, randomized, placebo-controlled, phase 2 trial, we assigned patients to receive low-dose crizanlizumab (2.5 mg per kilogram of body weight), high-dose crizanlizumab (5.0 mg per kilogram), or placebo, administered intravenously 14 times over a period of 52 weeks.

NCT03036813.label: Primary
NCT03036813.source: The New England journal of medicine
NCT03036813.text: The primary end point was the percentage of participants who had a hemoglobin response, which was defined as an increase of more than 1.0 g per deciliter from baseline at week 24 in the intention-to-treat analysis.

NCT01179217.label: Outcome
NCT01179217.source: The New England journal of medicine
NCT01179217.text: RESULTS: A total of 230 patients (age range, 5 to 58 years; 53.9% female) were randomly assigned, in a 2:1 ratio, to receive l-glutamine (152 patients) or placebo (78 patients).
